name: Victory Metals Limited
analysis: VTM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.6400, stop A$1.3563, target A$1.8400 (0.70:1) — then trail it.
